name: Oysters Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and cream in a saucepan, keeping them hot.
2. Check the oysters for any shell fragments. Drain and strain them, reserving the juice.
3. Melt the butter in the saucepan and add the oysters and their juice.
4. Cook until the edges of the oysters begin to ruffle.
5. Add the cooked oysters and their liquid to the scalded milk.
6. Add the seasonings (salt, white pepper, and nutmeg).
7. Serve immediately in soup dishes.
